pr.title: Non-record: Muon-Aware QAT + LAWA + Adaptive LR Scheduling (7 toggleable improvements)

output.summary: Combines Muon-aware late-start QAT with LAWA smoothing, adaptive LR scheduling, and compression tweaks tailored to Muon’s quant sensitivity.
techniques: Late-start Muon-aware QAT with optional Gaussian noise, LR clipping, and matrix-only targeting.
LAWA uniform averaging of late checkpoints plus LR floor and cooldown-fraction warmdown.
Sequence-length warmup, higher learning rates, and configurable zstd/Brotli compression.
